audit_items.proof_trace: Every pointer dereference in dnssrv.c is guarded: MALLOC/REALLOC results are NULL-checked before assignment (lines 78-82, 94-98, 151-153, 268-269, 348-350, 386-388); the `dn` and `rdn[j]` loop guards confirm non-NULL before `ava` is assigned and dereferenced; `hostent_head[0]` is accessed only after the `if (!hostent_head) goto out` guard (line 362). All three callers of `ldap_domain2hostlist` verify `domain != NULL` before calling (common.c:1224-1225, search.c:74, referral.c:64), ensuring the assert-guarded `*domain` at line 263 is never reached with NULL in practice.
